channel.title: GitHub Scala Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Scala in GitHub

item.title: ucb-bar/chipyard
item.description: An Agile RISC-V SoC Design Framework with in-order cores, out-of-order cores, accelerators, and more

item.title: apache/kyuubi
item.description: Apache Kyuubi is a distributed and multi-tenant gateway to provide serverless SQL on data warehouses and lakehouses.

item.title: lichess-org/lila
item.description: ♞ lichess.org: the forever free, adless and open source chess server ♞

item.title: apache/incubator-gluten
item.description: Gluten is a middle layer responsible for offloading JVM-based SQL engines' execution to native engines.

item.title: delta-io/delta
item.description: An open-source storage framework that enables building a Lakehouse architecture with compute engines including Spark, PrestoDB, Flink, Trino, and Hive and APIs

item.title: awslabs/deequ
item.description: Deequ is a library built on top of Apache Spark for defining "unit tests for data", which measure data quality in large datasets.

item.title: ucb-bar/chiseltest
item.description: The batteries-included testing and formal verification library for Chisel-based RTL designs.

item.title: gitbucket/gitbucket
item.description: A Git platform powered by Scala with easy installation, high extensibility & GitHub API compatibility

item.title: scala/scala3
item.description: The Scala 3 compiler, also known as Dotty.

item.title: firesim/firesim
item.description: FireSim: Fast and Effortless FPGA-accelerated Hardware Simulation with On-Prem and Cloud Flexibility

item.title: TheHive-Project/TheHive
item.description: TheHive: a Scalable, Open Source and Free Security Incident Response Platform

item.title: rtyley/bfg-repo-cleaner
item.description: Removes large or troublesome blobs like git-filter-branch does, but faster. And written in Scala
